_comment: Regression baselines for the Maelardalen (MRTC) WCET benchmark suite on MSP430.
Consumed by tests/regression_test.py. Each benchmark is BUILT and RUN through llta
(loop bounds come from the Clang LoopBoundPlugin via the #pragma loop_bound(...)
annotations in tests/srcMaelardalen/*.c). The recorded outcome is the contract:
expected: <int>  -> analysis produced this WCET; must reproduce exactly.
expected: null   -> a valid run that produces NO WCET (build-fail / crash /
analyze-fail). 'status'+'note' document why. A crash is a
valid test run: re-running must still produce no WCET (GREEN).
Refresh a value here when it legitimately changes; flip null<->int when behaviour
changes. status vocabulary: build-fail | crash | analyze-fail.

adpcm.note: MSP430 backend assert in EmitCMP/LowerSELECT_CC on double arithmetic; also has no main().

bs.note: Data-dependent binary search; JSON loop bound dropped (aggregator keys by full path, looks up by basename) -> loop unbounded -> ILP infeasible.

compress.note: KILL meta-instruction crash fixed (generic passes skip meta); now reaches ILP, which returns Failed to compute WCET (Tier 2/3).

crc.note: Data-dependent j<=len loop; JSON bound dropped (path/basename key mismatch) -> unbounded -> ILP infeasible.

dijkstra.note: Linker R_MSP430X_ABS16 reloc truncated: two 100x100 long arrays exceed the 16-bit data address space.

duff.note: SEXT16r latency crash fixed; now reaches ILP, which returns Failed to compute WCET (Tier 2/3).

edn.note: SEXT16r latency crash fixed; ILP returns Failed to compute WCET (Tier 2/3).

expint.note: IMPLICIT_DEF meta-instruction crash fixed; now emits a LOOSE WCET (~88.5M) because one loop bound (line 77, =49) is dropped and defaults to 32766 -- Tier 2a key mismatch. Left null (not a real contract) -> shows YELLOW until Tier 2a is fixed.

fft1.note: LLVM opt instcombine 'did not reach a fixpoint' on this float kernel.

fir.note: RAM overflow: in_data[701] + out_data[720] longs exceed MSP430 RAM.

insertsort.note: Inner loop bound dropped (JSON path/basename key mismatch) -> ILP unbounded.

janne_complex.note: Data-dependent nested loops; JSON bound dropped -> unbounded.

lms.note: FIXUP binary-grep fixed (grep -a); builds now, but ILP returns Failed to compute WCET (soft-float kernel, Tier 3).

ludcmp.note: FIXUP binary-grep fixed (grep -a); now fails at a later build step (no .elf produced).

matmult.note: All 5 loop bounds (20) applied, but ILP returns a non-positive WCET -> Failed to compute WCET.

minver.note: FIXUP binary-grep fixed (grep -a); builds now, but ILP returns Failed to compute WCET (Tier 3).

ndes.note: All 12 loop bounds applied, but the ILP is infeasible for this multi-helper-call structure.

prime.note: Start-function auto-detection returns nullptr on a CallGraph ref-count tie ('No StartingFunction found').

qsort-exam.note: SEXT16r latency crash fixed; ILP returns Failed to compute WCET (Tier 2/3).

qurt.note: Soft-float kernel; ILP solver reports 'Failed to compute WCET'.

recursion.note: Pure recursion (no loops); link also fails on undefined extern In. Analyzer bounds loops, not recursion.

select.note: Nested non-counting quickselect loops; ILP returns unbounded despite bounds being applied.

sqrt.note: No main() in the source; link fails (crt references undefined main).

statemate.note: Crash fixed upstream; now emits a GARBAGE WCET (~979M) because start-function auto-detection still returns nullptr ('No StartingFunction found') -- Tier 2b ref-count tie. Left null (not a real contract) -> shows YELLOW until Tier 2b is fixed.

ud.note: RAM overflow: long a[50][50] (~10KB) overflows FR5994 RAM.

whet.note: Link fails: undefined libm references sin/cos/atan/log/exp/sqrt (freestanding MSP430 link).
